title: cuscuta brevistyla var. biloba
intro: Cuscuta brevistyla var. biloba, also known as Dodder, is a parasitic flowering plant that grows by attaching itself to other plants and deriving its nutrients from them. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta brevistyla var. biloba include improving fertility, reducing stress and anxiety, and enhancing cognitive function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, capsules, or infusions, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
